summary: P0 Bug Fixes Verified - All 3 bugs fixed correctly. (1) CryptonAI branding replaced with Mentova throughout, (2) Mentor bio now displays in English 'Certified professional by the Mentova team' instead of French, (3) Offers with 0 content show 'Exclusive access to mentor content' instead of '0 premium contents'
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: CoinGecko crypto price API has mock fallback data
Backend server.py line 2273 correctly shows 'Certified professional by the Mentova team'
Frontend marketplace/index.tsx lines 454-461 correctly hide content count when included_content_ids.length is 0
Frontend marketplace/index.tsx lines 621-629 correctly show 'Exclusive access to mentor content' for zero-content offers
Translation key 'marketplace.exclusiveAccess' present in FR/EN/ES at lines 1751/4465/7132 in translations.ts
seed_data_creation: None - used existing offers in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes tested and verified. GET /api/marketplace/offers returns offers with bio 'Certified professional by the Mentova team' (English). Frontend correctly hides '0' content count and shows 'Exclusive access to mentor content' for offers without attached content. Homepage shows 'Welcome to Mentova' branding. Login at /login, marketplace at /marketplace.

bug1_cryptonai_branding.evidence: Homepage shows 'Welcome to Mentova', bio shows 'Mentova team', no CryptonAI found in API responses or UI

bug2_french_bio_text.evidence: API returns 'Certified professional by the Mentova team' (English). No French terms like 'Professionnel certifié' or 'l'équipe' found

bug3_zero_content_display.evidence: Offer listing hides content count icon when 0 items. Offer detail shows 'Exclusive access to mentor content' instead of '0 premium contents'
